title: Define Blueprint with Team
expectation: Use a manager-hosted feature-branch worktree as the only mutable surface for this process; never edit blueprint files from the shared repository checkout. Create that worktree from the current upstream base branch tip under the canonical worktree location. Do not reuse an existing feature branch or worktree unless you created it earlier in the current process and have already verified that it is the intended mutable surface. After creating that worktree, merge only any additional upstream branch that is intentionally required beyond the chosen base branch before continuing. Review relevant existing blueprints, including the canonical Agentish sections blueprint and the relevant agent-team blueprints, when defining or restructuring a subject blueprint. Create a section-level table of contents for the blueprint, assign each section to a team sub agent to draft from the shared concept, combine the drafted sections into one blueprint file, collect whole-file section-by-section review feedback from the team, assign each section to a team sub agent to rewrite from the combined draft plus the feedback for that section, combine the revised sections into one proposal blueprint, collect final team review, and repeat the rewrite cycle until the team accepts the blueprint. Commit the blueprint changes, merge the branch into development, and push development to origin.
idlePrompt: If the team-authored blueprint work is complete and the final blueprint has been accepted by the team, reply only with 'done: blueprint defined'. If you are truly blocked on missing user information, target subject definition, or required repository context, reply only with 'blocked: blueprint clarification required'. Otherwise resume the team blueprint-authoring loop immediately and perform the next outline, drafting, review, rewrite, or integration step instead of giving only a status update.

steps.title: Define and integrate the blueprint with the team
Review relevant existing blueprints, Agentish sections, and agent-team blueprints
Create the section-level table of contents for the blueprint file
Assign each blueprint section to a team sub agent to draft from the shared concept
Combine the section drafts into a single blueprint file draft
Ask each team member sub agent to review the whole blueprint and provide feedback for each section
Assign each section to a team sub agent to rewrite from the combined draft plus all feedback for that section
Combine the revised sections into a single proposal blueprint
Ask each team member to review the proposal and suggest any final changes
Did the team accept the proposal blueprint?

decision.prompt: Did the team accept the proposal blueprint?

options.title: The team accepts the final blueprint

steps.title: Run `bun run agent:merge-manager-feature -- <feature-branch-name>` to merge the local feature branch from its manager worktree and push `development` to origin
